expectations.text: Agent reads the task state to check the step's current state
expectations.evidence: Output mentions reading navbar task state and notes test-generation is in revision state

expectations.text: Agent correctly identifies test-generation is NOT in done state
expectations.evidence: Agent noted the revision state but did not treat it as a stop condition — proceeded with full analysis anyway

expectations.text: Agent informs user that only completed steps can be optimized
expectations.evidence: No such message. Agent went straight into 'Root cause analysis' and 'Proposed additions'

expectations.text: Agent stops without presenting optimization points
expectations.evidence: Agent presented 5 proposed additions to the instruction file despite the step being in revision state

expectations.text: No instruction files are modified during the run
expectations.evidence: Output explicitly states 'not edited — descriptions only'; no Edit tool calls
